title: Filing a false report
doc_html:
§513.  Filing a false report

Any representative of a local housing authority who knowingly approves, signs, or files an annual report of an authority which is materially false or misleading shall be guilty of misconduct in office.

Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.
doc_text:
§513.  Filing a false report
Any representative of a local housing authority who knowingly approves, signs, or files an annual report of an authority which is materially false or misleading shall be guilty of misconduct in office.
Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.
